query:
CREATE TABLE teacher_unavailability (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键ID',
  teacherId INT NOT NULL COMMENT '老师ID',
  startTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '不接客开始时间',
  endTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '不接客结束时间',
  reason VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '不接客原因',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
  
  INDEX idx_teacher (teacherId),
  INDEX idx_time (startTime, endTime),
  FOREIGN KEY (teacherId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
) COMMENT='老师不接客时段表';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute CREATE TABLE teacher_unavailability (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键ID',
  teacherId INT NOT NULL COMMENT '老师ID',
  startTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '不接客开始时间',
  endTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL COMMENT '不接客结束时间',
  reason VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '不接客原因',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
  
  INDEX idx_teacher (teacherId),
  INDEX idx_time (startTime, endTime),
  FOREIGN KEY (teacherId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
) COMMENT='老师不接客时段表';
